overall.description: First-person exploration through a foggy, geothermal mountain landscape in a video game. The camera moves from a rocky ridge down toward a hot spring with rising steam vents, passing through a misty pine forest in a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain ridge with scattered pines

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky ridge through heavy fog, approaching the stand of pine trees ahead

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine tree silhouetted against the fog, central focus of the view
second tall pine tree standing to the right of the main tree
moss-covered rocky terrain in the immediate foreground
distant mountain peaks shrouded in heavy fog and mist

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy mountain ridge with scattered pine trees emerging from the mist. The camera moves forward along rocky terrain, maintaining focus on a stand of tall evergreens while distant mountains remain obscured by the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal overlook with visible steam vents

events.description: passing through the pine trees reveals the geothermal steam vents and hot spring pool below

agents.ego_description: moving downhill past the pine trees, approaching the steam rising from the hot springs below

entered.detail: greenish thermal water basin with mist rising from the surface
multiple columns of steam rising from the hot spring vents
steep rocky outcrop forming the left boundary of the descent path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the pine trees, the scene opens to reveal a geothermal hot spring below with steam vents rising from the greenish water. The camera descends along a rocky path, transitioning from the tree line to the steam-filled basin while the rocky terrain shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring basin surrounded by dense steam

events.description: camera descends to the water's edge and moves along the shore of the hot spring

agents.ego_description: moving along the rocky edge of the hot spring pool, passing close to the steaming geothermal vents

entered.detail: thick column of white steam rising from a vent close to the camera path
tall steam vent near the water's edge on the right side
rocky shoreline along the edge of the thermal pool

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to water level, moving through dense steam clouds rising from the hot spring. The geothermal vents dominate the view as the camera tracks along the rocky shoreline, with the pool surface now filling the lower frame and steam obscuring the distant landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty mountain ridge down into a steaming geothermal basin. It begins by pushing forward along rocky terrain where scattered pine trees emerge from a heavy, obscuring fog. As the camera moves past the evergreens, the landscape opens to reveal a hot spring below, with the view shifting from the tree line to a descent along a rocky path toward greenish water and rising steam vents. The scene then transitions to water level, gliding through dense clouds of vapor that dominate the frame as the camera tracks along the shoreline. Finally, the geothermal vents fill the view, with the pool surface expanding across the lower frame while the distant mountains vanish entirely behind the thick steam.
